name: Half Life: Compound C
description:
Where research gets conducted, for the Combine and all of their collaborators.

Credits to ValvE's Half-Life franchise. P.S. You can play as whoever you wanna be!

...

<!> NEW EMAIL <!>
Translation: Earth (English)

Interworld Announcement: Research Fields Readily Available
In response to emerging scientific developments and abnormal world acquisitions, the Combine have delegated Compound C to guarantee immediate placement for personnel (of any species) possessing qualifications or active study in the following disciplines:

...

<> Synthetical Engineering <>
Pre-requisites: Applied Mathematics, Xenosynthetics, Morphonics

Transbiological Synths supplement extensive sectors of labor and enforcement, and the acquisition of new worlds introduces undeveloped organic lifeforms requiring adjustment. Synthetical Engineers are expected to apply controlled synthetic modifications to expand their functional capacity, up to appropriate alignments with the Combine economy.

...

<> Microxenology <>
Pre-requisites: Applied Mathematics, Xenology, Xenomorphonics

Microscopic xenorganisms present functional properties not observed in macroscale lifeforms, and estimated trillions are yet to be discovered. Microxenologists are expected to catalogue and repurpose such traits for medical, industrial, and enforcement applications of the Combine.

...

<> Portal Physics <>
Pre-requisites: Analytical Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, Morphonics

Acquisition of Earth proposed methods of portal transit previously absent from standardised practice, particularly at a local scale, which was thought implausible. Portal Physicists are expected to research and repurpose such systems and their aperture stability to revolutionise the momentum of the Combine expansion.

...
creator: Lifecraft
